curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge commit that updates cmark-gfm to 0.29.0.gfm.3. The primary fix is in ext/commonmarker/table.c in the row_from_string function, which adds a UINT16_MAX bounds check on row->n_columns before incrementing. Additional null-check guards were added in try_opening_table_header and try_opening_table_row. Only one non-test source file (table.c) was meaningfully changed; the other files are version bumps and a submodule pointer update. Location derived directly from the patch diff.
